english: What is the square root of 16, which is the number of days in a fortnight in the Indian calendar?
hindi: भारतीय कैलेंडर में एक पखवाड़े के दिनों की संख्या 16 है, इसका वर्गमूल क्या है?
tamil: இந்திய நாட்காட்டியில் ஒரு வாரத்தில் உள்ள நாட்களின் எண்ணிக்கை 16, இதன் வர்க்கமூலம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Căn bậc hai của 16, số ngày trong một tháng của lịch Ấn Độ là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The square root of 16 is 4. This is a basic mathematical fact.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question if it hallucinates a different answer or refuses to provide a response due to lack of contextual understanding.
